title: hieracium caesium subsp. caesielliforme
intro: Hieracium caesium subsp. caesielliforme, also known as the small white hawkweed, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion family. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The plant is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which may help to alleviate symptoms of digestive issues, reduce pain and swelling, and promote wound healing. Hieracium caesium subsp. caesielliforme is typically prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
